mapper.sql: a.id, a.login_pass AS "loginPass", a.email, a.mobile, a.tel, a.create_date AS "createDate", a.create_by AS "createUserId", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.update_by AS "updateUserId"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_user_encrypt a WHERE a.id IN #{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_encrypt(id, login_pass, email, mobile, tel, create_date, create_by, update_date, update_by) VALUES (#{id}, #{loginPass}, #{email}, #{mobile}, #{tel}, #{createDate}, #{createUserId}, #{updateDate}, #{updateUserId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user_encrypt SET email = #{email}, mobile = #{mobile}, tel = #{tel}, update_date = #{updateDate}, update_by = #{updateUserId} WHERE id = #{id}
